src/index.ts(1,7): error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
src/index.ts(6,7): error TS2345: Argument of type 'number' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string'.
src/index.ts(9,13): error TS2454: Variable 'value' is used before being assigned.
src/index.ts(9,19): error TS2339: Property 'name' does not exist on type '{ id: number; }'.
src/index.ts(11,26): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
src/index.ts(11,29): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
src/index.ts(11,32): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
